Appearances:
Plaintiff Ron Levine is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ephtali Boke is present.
Attorney Melvin C. Belli appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of September 18, 2017 is vacated. (501)
